name: reject_unknown_scope
description: ValidateScopes rejects a scope that is not in the canonical vocabulary and not a custom: extension (see SPEC.md §9). ExpandScopes passes the unknown string through (no wildcard match), and ValidateScopes returns an error. Implementations must treat such scopes as invalid before issuing a delegation. For app-specific scopes, use the custom: prefix (e.g. custom:acme:inventory:read) — those are accepted.
